book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. LUKE

verses.text: Then drew near unto him all the publicans and sinners for to hear him.
And the Pharisees and scribes murmured, saying, This man receiveth sinners, and eateth with them.
¶ And he spake this parable unto them, saying,

\+w What\+w* \+w man\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w having\+w* \+w an hundred\+w* \+w sheep\+w*, \+w if\+w* \+w he lose\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w them\+w*, \+w doth\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w leave\+w* \+w the ninety and nine\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the wilderness\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w go\+w* \+w after\+w* \+w that which\+w* \+w is lost\+w*, \+w until\+w* \+w he find\+w* \+w it\+w*?
\+w And\+w* \+w when he hath found\+w* \+add it\+add*, \+w he layeth\+w* \+add it\+add* \+w on\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w shoulders\+w*, \+w rejoicing\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w when he cometh\+w* \+w home\+w*, \+w he calleth together\+w* \+add his\+add* \+w friends\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w neighbours\+w*, \+w saying\+w* \+w unto them\+w*, \+w Rejoice with\+w* \+w me\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w I have found\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w sheep\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w was lost\+w*.

\+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w likewise\+w* \+w joy\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w* \+w over\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w sinner\+w* \+w that repenteth\+w*, \+w more than\+w* \+w over\+w* \+w ninety and nine\+w* \+w just persons\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w need\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w repentance\+w*.

¶ \+w Either\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w woman\+w* \+w having\+w* \+w ten\+w* \+w pieces of silver\+w*, \+w if\+w* \+w she lose\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w piece\+w*, \+w doth\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w light\+w* \+w a candle\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w sweep\+w* \+w the house\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w seek\+w* \+w diligently\+w* \+w till\+w* \+w she find\+w* \+add it\+add*?

\+w And\+w* \+w when she hath found\+w* \+add it\+add*, \+w she calleth\+w* \+add her\+add* \+w friends\+w* \+w and\+w* \+add her\+add* \+w neighbours\+w* \+w together\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+w Rejoice with\+w* \+w me\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w I have found\+w* \+w the piece\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w I had lost\+w*.

\+w Likewise\+w*, \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w there is\+w* \+w joy\+w* \+w in the presence of\+w* \+w the angels\+w* \+w of God\+w* \+w over\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w sinner\+w* \+w that repenteth\+w*.
¶ And he said, \+w A certain\+w* \+w man\+w* \+w had\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w sons\+w*:

\+w And\+w* \+w the younger\+w* \+w of them\+w* \+w said\+w* \+w to\+w* \+add his\+add* \+w father\+w*, \+w Father\+w*, \+w give\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w the portion\+w* \+w of goods\+w* \+w that falleth\+w* \+add to me\+add*. \+w And\+w* \+w he divided\+w* \+w unto them\+w* \+add his\+add* \+w living\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w many\+w* \+w days\+w* \+w after\+w* \+w the younger\+w* \+w son\+w* \+w gathered\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w together\+w*, \+w and took his journey\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w a far\+w* \+w country\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w there\+w* \+w wasted\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w substance\+w* \+w with riotous\+w* \+w living\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w when he\+w* \+w had spent\+w* \+w all\+w*, \+w there arose\+w* \+w a mighty\+w* \+w famine\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w land\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w he\+w* \+w began\+w* \+w to be in want\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w he went\+w* \+w and joined himself\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w a citizen\+w* \+w of that\+w* \+w country\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w he sent\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w fields\+w* \+w to feed\+w* \+w swine\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w he would fain\+w* \+w have filled\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w belly\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w the husks\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w the swine\+w* \+w did eat\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w no man\+w* \+w gave\+w* \+w unto him\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w when he came\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w himself\+w*, \+w he said\+w*, \+w How many\+w* \+w hired servants\+w* \+w of my\+w* \+w father’s\+w* \+w have bread\+w* \+w enough and to spare\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w perish\+w* \+w with hunger\+w*!

\+w I will arise\+w* \+w and go\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w father\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w will say\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w Father\+w*, \+w I have sinned\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w heaven\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w thee\+w*,
\+w And\+w* \+w am\+w* \+w no more\+w* \+w worthy\+w* \+w to be called\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w son\+w*: \+w make\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of thy\+w* \+w hired servants\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w he arose\+w*, \+w and came\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w father\+w*. \+w But\+w* \+w when he\+w* \+w was\+w* \+w yet\+w* \+w a great way off\+w*, \+w his\+w* \+w father\+w* \+w saw\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w had compassion\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ran\+w*, \+w and fell\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w neck\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w kissed\+w* \+w him\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w the son\+w* \+w said\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w Father\+w*, \+w I have sinned\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w heaven\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w sight\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w am\+w* \+w no more\+w* \+w worthy\+w* \+w to be called\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w son\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w the father\+w* \+w said\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w servants\+w*, \+w Bring forth\+w* \+w the best\+w* \+w robe\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w put\+w* \+add it\+add* \+w on\+w* \+w him\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w put\+w* \+w a ring\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w hand\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w shoes\+w* \+w on\+w* \+add his\+add* \+w feet\+w*:
\+w And\+w* \+w bring hither\+w* \+w the fatted\+w* \+w calf\+w*, \+w and kill\+w* \+add it\+add*; \+w and\+w* \+w let us eat\+w*, \+w and be merry\+w*:

\+w For\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w son\+w* \+w was\+w* \+w dead\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w is alive again\+w*; \+w he was\+w* \+w lost\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w is found\+w*. \+w And\+w* \+w they began\+w* \+w to be merry\+w*.

\+w Now\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w elder\+w* \+w son\+w* \+w was\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the field\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w he came\+w* \+w and drew nigh\+w* \+w to the house\+w*, \+w he heard\+w* \+w musick\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w dancing\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w he called\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of the servants\+w*, \+w and asked\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w these things\+w* \+w meant\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w he said\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w Thy\+w* \+w brother\+w* \+w is come\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w father\+w* \+w hath killed\+w* \+w the fatted\+w* \+w calf\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w he hath received\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w safe and sound\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w he was angry\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w would\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w go in\+w*: \+w therefore\+w* \+w came\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w father\+w* \+w out\+w*, \+w and intreated\+w* \+w him\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w he answering\+w* \+w said\+w* \+w to\+w* \+add his\+add* \+w father\+w*, \+w Lo\+w*, \+w these many\+w* \+w years\+w* \+w do I serve\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w neither\+w* \+w transgressed I\+w* \+w at any time\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w commandment\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w yet thou\+w* \+w never\+w* \+w gavest\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w a kid\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w I might make merry\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w friends\+w*:

\+w But\+w* \+w as soon as\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w son\+w* \+w was come\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w hath devoured\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w living\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w harlots\+w*, \+w thou hast killed\+w* \+w for him\+w* \+w the fatted\+w* \+w calf\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w he said\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w Son\+w*, \+w thou\+w* \+w art\+w* \+w ever\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w that I have\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w thine\+w*.

\+w It was meet\+w* \+w that we should make merry\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w be glad\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w brother\+w* \+w was\+w* \+w dead\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w is alive again\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w was\+w* \+w lost\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w is found\+w*.
